title: Dias Athacorr

'''Dias Athacorr''' was an [[Arkanian]]<ref name="CSWE" /> who [[Homeworld/Legends|hailed]] from<ref name="TAL" /> the [[Planet/Legends|world]]<ref name="KOTOR 33">[[Knights of the Old Republic 33|''Knights of the Old Republic'' 33]]</ref> [[Arkania/Legends|Arkania]]. Athacorr served the [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Galactic Republic]] as an [[Republic officer/Legends|officer]] in the [[Republic Navy/Legends|Republic Navy]] during the [[Mandalorian Wars]]. This war, between the Republic and the resurgent forces of the [[Mandalorian/Legends|Mandalorians]], began in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]], where the [[Mandalorian Neo-Crusaders/Legends|Mandalorians]] made a three-pronged assault against the Republic<ref name="TAL" /> in [[3963 BBY]].<ref name="TEA">''[[The Essential Atlas]]''</ref> In the aftermath of this assault, known by the Republic media as the "Onslaught," Athacorr received a promotion to the [[Military rank/Legends|rank]] of [[Commander/Legends|commander]]. This promotion, reported in the [[The Admiral's List: Jimas Veltraa Memorial Edition|Jimas Veltraa Memorial Edition]] of ''[[The Admiral's List]]'', an official publication of the Republic Navy, occurred alongside that of notable [[Officer/Legends|officer]] [[Saul Karath]] to [[Rear Admiral/Legends|Rear Admiral]].<ref name="TAL" />

==Behind the scenes==
Dias Athacorr was first mentioned in "[[The Admiral's List: Jimas Veltraa Memorial Edition]]," an edition of the [[in-universe]] ''The Admiral's List'' publication. The publication was included in the [[Knights of the Old Republic 13|thirteenth issue]] of the [[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic (comic series)|''Knights of the Old Republic'']] [[Star Wars comic books|comic-book]] series, written by [[John Jackson Miller]], and released by [[Dark Horse Comics]]<ref name="TAL" /> on [[January 31]], [[2007]].<ref name="DH">{{DarkHorse|url=Comics/14-394/Star-Wars-Knights-of-the-Old-Republic-13|text=Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic #13}}</ref>
